name: drone-simulation
description: Start/stop/monitor PX4-SITL + Gazebo simulations with a live 3D viewport, from the Vyuta drone IDE.

vyuta.simulation.managerUrl.description: WebSocket URL of the sim-manager sidecar.

vyuta.simulation.defaultWorld.description: World id pre-selected in the panel (e.g. default, baylands, windy, lawn).

vyuta.simulation.defaultVehicle.description: Vehicle id pre-selected in the panel (e.g. x500, standard_vtol, rc_cessna, r1_rover).

vyuta.simulation.headless.description: Start real simulations headless (no Gazebo GUI). Ignored by the built-in mock.

vyuta.simulation.forceMock.description: Always request the sidecar's built-in mock flight, even when a real PX4 + Gazebo toolchain is available (useful for UI work).
